aquacroptools 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Regional Crop Simulations Using aquacroptools

Write AquaCrop Parameter (.PRM) File for Single Year

Source: R/write_prm.R
write_prm.Rd

Creates an AquaCrop parameter file (.PRM) for a single station and year. Includes the header (crop name and version) plus the year block.

write_prm(
  path = "LIST/",
  station_name,
  year,
  planting_doy,
  crop_name,
  crop_path,
  crop_duration = 90,
  climate_path = "./climate/",
  management_path = "./management/",
  soil_path = "./soil/",
  simulation_start_doy = NULL,
  scenario = "hist",
  write_header = TRUE,
  eol = "windows",
  use_standalone = TRUE,
  base_path
)

Arguments

path

Output directory path (absolute or relative)

station_name

Station identifier (used to find CLI, Tnx, ETo, PLU files)

year

Year of cultivation

planting_doy

Day of year for planting (1-365/366)

crop_name

Crop name (e.g., "maize_90days")

crop_path

Path to crop file directory

crop_duration

Growing season length in days

climate_path

Path to climate file directory (absolute or relative)

management_path

Path to management file directory (absolute or relative)

soil_path

Path to soil file directory (absolute or relative)

simulation_start_doy

Day of year for simulation start (NULL = April 1st)

scenario

Climate scenario: "hist", "rcp26", "rcp45", "rcp60", "rcp85", "ssp119", "ssp126", "ssp245", "ssp370", "ssp585"

write_header

Logical. If TRUE (default), writes header. FALSE for batch mode.

eol

End-of-line type: "windows" (default) or "unix"

use_standalone

Logical. Whether running in standalone mode (default: TRUE)

base_path

Character. Base absolute path (required for file existence checking)

Value

Invisibly returns the output file path

Contents
